description.en: Upload an image, video, or other media file to your agent's media library.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.
description.fr: JoAi est une plateforme qui permet de créer et de gérer vos propres agents IA.
description.es: JoAi es una plataforma para crear y gestionar tus propios agentes de IA.
description.ro: JoAi este o platforma pentru crearea si gestionarea propriilor tai agenti AI.

warp.name: JoAi: Upload Media

description.en: Upload an image, video, or other media file to your agent's media library.
description.de: Lade ein Bild, Video oder eine andere Mediendatei in die Medienbibliothek deines Agenten hoch.
description.es: Upload an image, video, or other media file to your agent's media library.
description.fr: Upload an image, video, or other media file to your agent's media library.
description.ro: Upload an image, video, or other media file to your agent's media library.
description.it: Upload an image, video, or other media file to your agent's media library.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to add media to their agent. Ask for the file URL or content and an optional label.

inputs.name: URL

description.en: The URL of the media to upload
description.es: The URL of the media to upload
description.fr: The URL of the media to upload
description.ro: The URL of the media to upload
description.it: The URL of the media to upload

inputs.bot: The public URL of the media file to upload (image, video, etc.).

inputs.name: Label

description.en: A label or name for this media
description.de: Ein Label oder Name für dieses Medium
description.es: A label or name for this media
description.fr: A label or name for this media
description.ro: A label or name for this media
description.it: A label or name for this media

inputs.bot: An optional label to identify this media in the library.

inputs.name: Type
inputs.bot: The media type (e.g., image, video, audio, document).

description.en: View the current vote counts for each option.
description.de: Die aktuellen Stimmen pro Option anzeigen.
description.fr: Consultez le nombre actuel de voix pour chaque option.
description.es: Consulta el numero actual de votos de cada opcion.
description.ro: Vezi numarul curent de voturi pentru fiecare optiune.
description.it: View the current vote counts for each option.

description.en: On-chain polls and voting groups for any community — property owners, DAOs, teams, and more.
description.de: On-Chain-Abstimmungen und Voting-Gruppen für jede Gemeinschaft — Eigentümer, DAOs, Teams und mehr.
description.fr: Sondages on-chain et groupes de vote pour toutes les communautes : coproprietes, DAO, equipes et bien plus.
description.es: Encuestas on-chain y grupos de votacion para cualquier comunidad: propietarios, DAOs, equipos y mas.
description.ro: Sondaje on-chain si grupuri de vot pentru orice comunitate: proprietari, DAO-uri, echipe si multe altele.
